description_long: This is a large, heavily armored combat vehicle with a distinctive angular design and a prominent, elongated main cannon mounted on a rotating turret. The body is painted in a yellow and black color scheme with some white and metallic accents, and features robust, reinforced plating across all surfaces. The vehicle is equipped with wide, continuous track systems on both sides, providing stability and traction for urban and rugged environments. The turret houses the main weapon, which extends far beyond the front of the vehicle, and there are visible hatches and access panels on the upper surfaces. The sides of the vehicle display some insignia and markings, and the overall construction suggests a focus on durability and firepower. The exterior finish is hard and slightly matte, with some areas showing a subtle sheen.
description: A large, yellow and black armored combat vehicle with a long main cannon, wide tracks, and reinforced plating, featuring military markings and a robust, angular design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide tracks, reinforced frontal armor, and the base of the main turret and cannon.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the full length of the main cannon, side armor, track system, and visible insignia.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back armor, exhaust vents, and the rear sections of the tracks.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with visible side armor, track system, and additional markings.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large main cannon mounted on the central turret; no additional weapon mounts visible.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, angular armor plating; reinforced on the front, sides, and turret; sloped surfaces for deflection.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Painted in a yellow and black scheme with some white and gray accents; no traditional camouflage pattern visible.
attribute_military_markings: White circular insignia on the side panels; no numbers or additional symbols visible.
